content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom C:17 in the molecule. Looking at the image, I can see that atom C:17 (carbon with index 17) is connected to:

1. C:15 (carbon, index 15) - shown by the yellow bond
2. H:18 (hydrogen, index 18) - shown by the white bond
3. O:19 (oxygen, index 19) - shown by the red bond

The molecule appears to be a cyclic structure with nitrogen and oxygen atoms. Atom C:17 is part of what looks like a five-membered ring.

From the image, I can confirm that C:17 has exactly three covalent bonds: one to C:15, one to H:18, and one to O:19.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file name "geomconf_6740.xyz", the geomconf_index for this molecule is 6740.

So the neighbor atoms of atom C:17 are:
- Atom index 15, element C
- Atom index 18, element H  
- Atom index 19, element O

And the geomconf_index is 6740.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 17, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
